props.name: inputMode
props.jsdoc: Hints at the type of data that might be entered by the user while editing the element or its contents

props.name: is
props.jsdoc: Specify that a standard HTML element should behave like a defined custom built-in element

props.name: aria-activedescendant
props.jsdoc: Identifies the currently active element when DOM focus is on a composite widget, textbox, group, or application.

props.name: aria-atomic
props.jsdoc: Indicates whether assistive technologies will present all, or only parts of, the changed region based on the change notifications defined by the aria-relevant attribute.

props.name: aria-autocomplete
props.jsdoc:
Indicates whether inputting text could trigger display of one or more predictions of the user's intended value for an input and specifies how predictions would be
presented if they are made.

props.name: aria-braillelabel
props.jsdoc: Indicates an element is being modified and that assistive technologies MAY want to wait until the modifications are complete before exposing them to the user.

props.name: aria-brailleroledescription
props.jsdoc: Defines a human-readable, author-localized abbreviated description for the role of an element, which is intended to be converted into Braille.

props.name: aria-checked
props.jsdoc: Indicates the current "checked" state of checkboxes, radio buttons, and other widgets.

props.name: aria-colcount
props.jsdoc: Defines the total number of columns in a table, grid, or treegrid.

props.name: aria-colindex
props.jsdoc: Defines an element's column index or position with respect to the total number of columns within a table, grid, or treegrid.

props.name: aria-colindextext
props.jsdoc: Defines a human readable text alternative of aria-colindex.

props.name: aria-colspan
props.jsdoc: Defines the number of columns spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.

props.name: aria-controls
props.jsdoc: Identifies the element (or elements) whose contents or presence are controlled by the current element.

props.name: aria-current
props.jsdoc: Indicates the element that represents the current item within a container or set of related elements.

props.name: aria-describedby
props.jsdoc: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

props.name: aria-description
props.jsdoc: Defines a string value that describes or annotates the current element.

props.name: aria-details
props.jsdoc: Identifies the element that provides a detailed, extended description for the object.

props.name: aria-disabled
props.jsdoc: Indicates that the element is perceivable but disabled, so it is not editable or otherwise operable.

props.name: aria-dropeffect
props.jsdoc: Indicates what functions can be performed when a dragged object is released on the drop target.

props.name: aria-errormessage
props.jsdoc: Identifies the element that provides an error message for the object.

props.name: aria-expanded
props.jsdoc: Indicates whether the element, or another grouping element it controls, is currently expanded or collapsed.

props.name: aria-flowto
props.jsdoc:
Identifies the next element (or elements) in an alternate reading order of content which, at the user's discretion,
allows assistive technology to override the general default of reading in document source order.

props.name: aria-grabbed
props.jsdoc: Indicates an element's "grabbed" state in a drag-and-drop operation.

props.name: aria-haspopup
props.jsdoc: Indicates the availability and type of interactive popup element, such as menu or dialog, that can be triggered by an element.

props.name: aria-hidden
props.jsdoc: Indicates whether the element is exposed to an accessibility API.

props.name: aria-invalid
props.jsdoc: Indicates the entered value does not conform to the format expected by the application.

props.name: aria-keyshortcuts
props.jsdoc: Indicates keyboard shortcuts that an author has implemented to activate or give focus to an element.

props.name: aria-label
props.jsdoc: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.jsdoc: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

props.name: aria-level
props.jsdoc: Defines the hierarchical level of an element within a structure.

props.name: aria-live
props.jsdoc: Indicates that an element will be updated, and describes the types of updates the user agents, assistive technologies, and user can expect from the live region.

props.name: aria-modal
props.jsdoc: Indicates whether an element is modal when displayed.

props.name: aria-multiline
props.jsdoc: Indicates whether a text box accepts multiple lines of input or only a single line.

props.name: aria-multiselectable
props.jsdoc: Indicates that the user may select more than one item from the current selectable descendants.

props.name: aria-orientation
props.jsdoc: Indicates whether the element's orientation is horizontal, vertical, or unknown/ambiguous.

props.name: aria-owns
props.jsdoc:
Identifies an element (or elements) in order to define a visual, functional, or contextual parent/child relationship
between DOM elements where the DOM hierarchy cannot be used to represent the relationship.

props.name: aria-placeholder
props.jsdoc:
Defines a short hint (a word or short phrase) intended to aid the user with data entry when the control has no value.
A hint could be a sample value or a brief description of the expected format.

props.name: aria-posinset
props.jsdoc: Defines an element's number or position in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.

props.name: aria-pressed
props.jsdoc: Indicates the current "pressed" state of toggle buttons.

props.name: aria-readonly
props.jsdoc: Indicates that the element is not editable, but is otherwise operable.

props.name: aria-relevant
props.type: | "additions" | "additions removals" | "additions text" | "all" | "removals" | "removals additions" | "removals text" | "text" | "text additions" | "text removals" | undefined
props.jsdoc: Indicates what notifications the user agent will trigger when the accessibility tree within a live region is modified.

props.name: aria-required
props.jsdoc: Indicates that user input is required on the element before a form may be submitted.

props.name: aria-roledescription
props.jsdoc: Defines a human-readable, author-localized description for the role of an element.

props.name: aria-rowcount
props.jsdoc: Defines the total number of rows in a table, grid, or treegrid.

props.name: aria-rowindex
props.jsdoc: Defines an element's row index or position with respect to the total number of rows within a table, grid, or treegrid.

props.name: aria-rowindextext
props.jsdoc: Defines a human readable text alternative of aria-rowindex.

props.name: aria-rowspan
props.jsdoc: Defines the number of rows spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.

props.name: aria-selected
props.jsdoc: Indicates the current "selected" state of various widgets.

props.name: aria-setsize
props.jsdoc: Defines the number of items in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.

props.name: aria-sort
props.jsdoc: Indicates if items in a table or grid are sorted in ascending or descending order.

props.name: aria-valuemax
props.jsdoc: Defines the maximum allowed value for a range widget.

props.name: aria-valuemin
props.jsdoc: Defines the minimum allowed value for a range widget.

props.name: aria-valuenow
props.jsdoc: Defines the current value for a range widget.

props.name: aria-valuetext
props.jsdoc: Defines the human readable text alternative of aria-valuenow for a range widget.

<ActivityLog activities={[
    {
      title: 'Quote request submitted',
      summary: '11/03/23 15:33 - by Erika',
      comment: 'Can I have a 10% discount on Bd10T789?',
    },
    {
      title: 'Quote Accepted by Seller',
      summary: '11/03/23 15:33 - by Anders',
      comment: 'I have applied your discount Erika!',
    },
    {
      title: 'Awaiting reply from you',
      reply: true,
      ctaLink: 'Request to Renogitiate',
    },
  ]} />

      key: 'totalPrice.centAmount',
      name: 'Cart amount',
      type: 'text',
      operators: [
        { name: 'Is equal', value: '=' },
        { name: 'Is more than', value: '>' },
        { name: 'Is less than', value: '<' },
      ],
    },
    {
      key: 'currency',
      name: 'Cart currency',
      type: 'enum',
      operators: [
        { name: 'Is', value: 'is' },
        { name: 'Is not', value: 'is not' },
      ],
      values: [
        { name: 'USD', value: 'usd' },
        { name: 'EUR', value: 'eur' },
      ],
    },
  ]} />
